# Cloudbox

Cloudbox generates synthetic cloud computers for long-horizon agent practice on Cloudflare.

Important paths:
- `/quickstart`: how to run and deploy.
- `/concepts`: persona, filesystem planning, artifacts, collaborators, simulation, retrospective.
- `/api`: public API endpoints.

Core API:
- `GET /api/demo`
- `POST /api/generate`
- `POST /api/runs`
- `GET /api/artifacts/:id`
- `GET /api/export`
